reviews.review_description: The game is now weird. They added pets and like a bunch of other stuff meanwhile, they just kept the same game. I would love the game and every time I tried doing a matchmaking it never works. Do not play it. Waste all your time and I hope you read this because it just sucks. The players stink have the time can’t get into a match so yeah. ￼

developer_response.body:
Hi, camjam6115! Thanks for being an OG player and for sharing your thoughts.

We're sorry to hear you've been having trouble with matchmaking. That definitely shouldn't be happening. If you're still experiencing this issue, please stop by our Discord and let us know so we can investigate further. We appreciate the feedback and will continue improving the game with future updates.

reviews.review_description: I was board one day on my VR when I saw this game, thinking it was just another dumb game that I'd play for about an hour before deleting, I decided to get it for sh!ts and giggles, but after about 2 days of amazing gameplay(and spending hours learning how to properly move) I actually spent over 20 hours on this game, 11/10 would recommend

reviews.review_title: Game is bad, promotions are AI
reviews.review_description: This game is honestly the biggest waste of storage I have ever made. The channel that promotes this game uses ai thumbnails, ai voices and the game is honestly just unfun, boring and lame. The game uses tons of ai, and is littered with microtransactions. Most channels who promote this game are blatantly lying about gameplay, and the game is honestly just bad. It has kids calling you slurs, unfair balancing issues, crappy movement and the least entertaining gameplay loop I have ever come across. Please don’t waste your time on this god awful game. Really disappointed and gave it an honest chance

developer_response.body:
Hi, savagelizard789! Sorry to hear the game didn't meet your expectations.

Over the past few months, we've continued expanding Last Bone with major updates, including Skull Island, weapon upgrades, PvE content, new progression systems, new creatures, and ongoing gameplay improvements. We're also actively working on balance, performance, and community moderation.

We appreciate you giving the game a chance and taking the time to share your thoughts. Player feedback helps us continue improving the experience for everyone.

reviews.review_description:
this game is actually pretty fun i like this game really much but we just need some new updates some lower chances to get more gold and you need to add a lot of orders to the game now a new weapons so i'm just waiting for that this game is a five star 
and if you're looking for a game that's like fine funny at 10 time or weapons in it this is the perfect game

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the feedback and support! Perfect timing actually — our huge new update just launched 。 We’ve added lots of new content and more updates are coming soon, including new weapons and more features. Really happy to hear you’re enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: This game could be better. It’s a good idea for a game but the final product is a buggy mess. The gorilla tag movement is very buggy and high gravity and your hand most of the time will clip through objects just from moving them fast. And last of all the amount of little kids screaming at the top of there longs is out of hand

this game was fun so I decided to install it but when I got into the game the loading screen wouldn’t get past 50 I tried resetting I tried uninstalling and reinstalling and even factory reset my headset but none of it worked

developer_response.body:
Hi, gold.D.roger.7853! Sorry about that! We identified and fixed an issue that was causing some players to get stuck on the loading screen.

Please make sure your game is updated to the latest version (v0.52.0.72) and give it another try. Let us know if you're still having trouble getting in.

reviews.review_description: The games movement sucks plus every weapon cost coins I’m happy you can have a private server but also there needs to be a update where you can play sports or houses with gaming setups honestly that’s really just what I watch the games booty cheeks I am good at the same time honestly I don’t know if this point plus there’s basically nothing to do

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for being honest — we really appreciate the feedback.

We hear you on the movement and progression. We’re actively working on improving how the game feels and making the experience more rewarding. The idea of adding social spaces like houses, gaming setups, or even sports-style modes is actually really interesting — we’ll definitely take that into consideration.

We’re still building and updating the game, so there’s more coming. Thanks for sticking with us and sharing your thoughts.

reviews.review_title: i USED to like this game
reviews.review_description: The new pet upd breaks everything bad hitboxes, delayed damage, delayed click rpg explosion, sometimes don't even get weapons, and so much more things you've heard the backlash honestly please just go to unity and spam ctrl z until the old game is back and I'm and I've spent like 30$ on this game and now that's just wasted money I'm also og used to play all the time

developer_response.body: Hi, coolugguyvr! Thanks for being an OG player and for sticking with Last Bone for so long. We hear you — this update changed a lot, and we know it hasn’t felt good for everyone. We’ve already started making adjustments and rolling out fixes based on feedback. Sorry this experience wasn’t what you expected, and thank you for taking the time to tell us.

reviews.review_description: The game became bad when rpgs were addedthen they stole from ug and basicly removed the crafting machine. This game was fun back then now the skeleton`s body has changed but the head didnt and now it feels like ai made this game like even the movement is trash

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for the feedback. We know this update changed a lot compared to the original experience. The classic modes are still available, while the new Adventure mode was added as an additional way to play. We’ll keep improving and balancing all three experiences moving forward.

reviews.review_description: I liked the og but then this big update its so laggy and barely can move or just my pet to move also the dogs or animals barely even go to things you click. Also don't know how to join a private pve fun but broken :(

developer_response.body:
Hey, michae.nation! Thanks a lot for the feedback! Sorry it felt laggy after the update! We’ve seen some similar reports and the team is actively working on performance improvements right now. For the private PVE, you can access it from the lobby area if you want to try again.
If you’re open to it, feel free to join our Discord (Discord.gg/lastbone) — we can help you troubleshoot the lag directly there and also share fixes/updates as soon as they go live. Really appreciate you trying the update and sharing this!🙏

reviews.review_title: Didn't get to play the game
reviews.review_description: I was siting in the Loading screen for an hour and it was stuck at 50% wasted time

developer_response.body:
Hi, MRTKG! Sorry for the frustration. The loading screen issue has now been fixed and the latest version is available.

If you're on v0.52.0.72, you should be able to get into the game normally. Thanks for bringing the issue to our attention.

Everything shown in-game is real gameplay, and purchases are optional. Thanks for sharing your feedback.
